task.question: Using only official Firecrawl docs, what does the Search API say about categories, country, timeout, and ignoreInvalidURLs?
task.agentGoal: Constrain to docs.firecrawl.dev and produce evidence only from that domain.

callRationale: Started the requested firecrawl-context run and inspected the exposed tool schema.
Used firecrawl_search because the exact docs URL was not assumed up front and the tool exposed native sourcePolicy.includeDomains controls.
Constrained search to docs.firecrawl.dev with sourcePolicy.includeDomains and used chunks mode for focused parameter evidence.
Followed up with firecrawl_scrape on the discovered official Search endpoint because the search chunks clipped some body-field descriptions needed for timeout and ignoreInvalidURLs.
strengths: Native sourcePolicy.includeDomains was available and the executed search query added a docs.firecrawl.dev site constraint.
All returned search result domains were docs.firecrawl.dev.
The exact Search endpoint scrape provided direct support for all expected terms: categories, country, timeout, and ignoreInvalidURLs.
The final answer cites only the official docs.firecrawl.dev Search endpoint.
weaknesses: The MCP tool surface is large, producing a high schema/description footprint before the first content call.
The first search response included duplicated chunks and localized/CLI docs pages in addition to the primary Search endpoint.
The focused search chunks clipped some parameter descriptions, so an exact-page scrape was needed.

notableFailures.category: direct fix and needs no further changes
notableFailures.description: The first attempted harness call failed with ENOENT because the args JSON was accidentally written relative to the original shell repo instead of /Users/ethanaggor/firecrawl-results.
notableFailures.fix: Removed the accidental scratch file with trash, rewrote the args file under the requested evals/work run directory, and reran the same harness call successfully.
notableFailures.architecturalConcern: No provider or benchmark architecture change is needed.
